text:
with antibiotics, surgery, or both
B2 (stricturing**)
Pre-stenotic dilatation, obstructive signs/symptoms (or both)
High
Anti-TNF as first-line therapy
B3 (penetrating***)
—
High
Intestinal resection combined with postoperative anti-TNF therapy
B3 (penetrating***)
—
High
Surgery combined with postoperative anti-TNF therapy
Abbreviations: TNF = tumor necrosis factor
* Extensive disease: pan-enteric inflammation (proximal small intestine, terminal ileum and colon).
** Stricturing: fixed luminal narrowing demonstrated by radiologic or endoscopic examination.
*** Penetrating: intestinal perforation, intra-abdominal fistulas, inflammatory masses and/or abscesses during the course of the disease (excluding surgical complications).
